arts.ttl: Brentford vs Everton Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Everton will be aiming to continue their fine form under David Moyes when they make the trip to west London to face Brentford this evening. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, ...

arts.ttl: Brentford's Cochrane joins England coaching staff
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel appoints Brentford coach Justin Cochrane to Three Lions' backroom staff.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot given touchline ban and huge fine by FA after Everton chaos
arts.sum: Arne Slot has been given a two-match ban with his assistant Sipke Hulshoff also suspended and both Liverpool and Everton fined

arts.ttl: Arne Slot hit with extended ban after Everton vs Liverpool rant as FA release statement
arts.sum: Arne Slot got himself into hot water after the Merseyside Derby at Goodison Park, and the Liverpool manager has now learned the punishment he will face following the match

arts.ttl: Slot given two-game ban for red card at Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot is given a two-game touchline ban following his red card against Everton this month.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot banned for abusing referee Michael Oliver after Liverpool’s chaotic derby draw with Everton
arts.sum: Slot’s assistant manager Sipke Hulshoff has also been banned while both Liverpool and Everton have been fined for failing to control their players and staff in the aftermath of a wild Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Brentford's Cochrane joins Tuchel's England staff
arts.sum: Brentford coach Justin Cochrane has become the final member of Thomas Tuchel's newly formed England coaching staff, the Football Association confirmed.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel completes England coaching staff with key appointment from Brentford
arts.sum: Justin Cochrane will take on a role in addition to his duties with Thomas Frank’s side

arts.ttl: 'I wasn't happy' - Jake O'Brien reveals tense Sean Dyche talks after Everton transfer frustration
arts.sum: Jake O'Brien was speaking following Everton's 2-2 Premier League draw with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Beto photo revelation telling as Everton transformation much more than just goals
arts.sum: Beto isn't just scoring more goals for Everton under David Moyes, his style of play has also changed
